title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider workflows using Archon, testing whether Claude Opus or Kimi K2.6 should handle planning versus implementation for software development tasks. An Opus-based evaluator scores four variants across seven dimensions on three real GitHub issues to determine optimal provider allocation.
